description: Standardized schema for reporting the outcome of sx-factory production tasks.

execution_id.description: Unique identifier linked to the task_id or plan_id.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the production task was completed.

worker_identity.description: ID of the sub-agent/worker that performed the task (e.g., 'claude-code').

status.description: The final outcome of the execution.

artifacts.description: List of all physical outputs generated during this task.

logs_summary.description: A high-level, human-readable summary of the execution steps.

errors.description: List of error messages or warnings encountered during execution (empty if success).
